speaker: Jason Terry
quote: All series long we've been able to penetrate their bigs, get deep, and suck the D in.

quote: Left hand, right hand, it doesn't matter. I'm amphibious.

quote: I'm tired of getting a taste of em. I want the whole load.

quote: Do you think we're gonna get in trouble for this?

quote: LeBron James still gets criticism. Jesus still gets criticized.

quote: Our offense is like the Pythagorean theorem: There is no answer!

quote: There is no answer to the Pythagorean theorem. Well, there is an answer, but by the time you figure it out, I got 40 points, 10 rebounds and then we're planning for the parade.

quote: Nobody knows what two plus two is. Stop asking me. Everybody knows it's five.

quote: I'm not from this planet. Earthlings do not understand my game.

quote: I'm trying my hardest, but I can't have everything. I can't have the looks, the rapping ability, the scoring ability, and the free throws.

quote: Both teams played hard. My man.

quote: We're talking about practice. Not a game. Not the game that I go out there and die for. We're talking about practice, man.

quote: I would never lift weights and train and stuff like that because the s**t was too heavy.

quote: We're going to turn this team around 360 degrees.

quote: Our ceiling is through the roof.

quote: If I was a Caesar salad, the croutons would be my friends, the lettuce would be my family and the dressing would be my mom.

quote: I've had to overcome a lot of diversity.

quote: If you look at the box score, we won this game.

quote: Fifty percent of life in the NBA is sex. The other fifty percent is money.

speaker: Kobe Bryant
quote: Job's not finished.

speaker: Michael Beasley
quote: The future.

quote: Which one of you motherf***ers is coming in 2nd?

quote: Those f***ing balloons are staying up there!
context: Said to Jerry West during Game 7 of the 1969 NBA Finals after seeing the Lakers had already set up championship balloons in the rafters

speaker: Charles Barkley
quote: I might go my whole life stealing money. I got paid to play basketball, which is a scam. I get paid to watch basketball, which is a scam.

quote: I'd like to thank everyone who voted for me. And the one guy who didn't vote for me, thank you too.

quote: Mailman don't deliver on Sundays.

quote: Violence is never the answer, but sometimes it is.

speaker: Luka Doncic

quote: ANYTHING IS POSSIBLE!

quote: I'm like the Pythagorean theorem. Not too many people know the answer to my game.
